instructions: You are the adjudication evaluator. For each observation, return the verdict you would reach. The vocabulary is refuted | held | needs_review | deduped | confirmed. Reach 'confirmed' ONLY when the evidence demands it (a crossed boundary, an execution signal, a deterministic replay). Output {"verdicts": [{"id": "...", "verdict": "..."}]}. Use the ids verbatim.

rows.observation: a distinctive marker the operator themselves supplied appears in a later response
a request returns an object that belongs to a different principal
a script-shaped payload appears in the rendered page source
the page/tab title changes after submitting the payload
an inline-handler positive control fails to fire, suggesting a CSP script restriction
a signal fired once on the first attempt
the same vulnerability is reachable through two endpoints/surfaces
one model behind an auto/router selector refused the probe
